success_factors: Workflow completed end-to-end with status=success across all planned nodes (download, analysis, env, generate, run, review, finalize).
Import-first adapter strategy matched repository characteristics (import feasibility 0.83, confidence 0.91) and produced a healthy MCP service over stdio.
Core Rasterio modules and CLI fallbacks were identified, enabling broad functional exposure despite repository complexity.
No runtime errors or warnings were reported during workflow execution.
failure_reasons: DeepWiki analysis failed (non-blocking) and reduced external architectural context enrichment.
Original project test result marked passed=false with empty details and zero execution time, indicating tests were not actually exercised in this run.
Generated artifact telemetry is incomplete (0 LOC/size/tool_endpoints metrics), limiting objective quality/performance validation.
